abilities.description: Regenerate target Insect, Rat, Spider, or Squirrel. (The next time it would be destroyed, instead tap it, remove it from combat, and heal all damage on it.)

effect.description: Regenerate target Insect, Rat, Spider, or Squirrel. (The next time it would be destroyed, instead tap it, remove it from combat, and heal all damage on it.)
effect.name: Regenerate

abilities.target_prompt: Select target Insect, Rat, Spider, or Squirrel
